name: The 'cross db ownership chaining' database flag for Cloud SQL on the SQL Server instance is set to 'off'
query: { cloudSqlInstances( where: { engine: { eq: "sqlserver" } cloudProvider: { eq: "gcp" } OR: [ { dbFlags_NONE: { name: { eq: "cross db ownership chaining" } } } { dbFlags_SOME: { name: { eq: "cross db ownership chaining" }, value: { eq: "on" } } } ] } ) { ...AssetFragment }}
